q: The word 'rewarding' in paragraph 1 is CLOSEST in meaning to ______.
e: Từ 'rewarding' (bổ ích, thỏa mãn) đồng nghĩa với 'satisfying'.

q: The word 'which' in paragraph 1 refers to ______.
e: Đại từ quan hệ 'which' (trong cấu trúc 'gardening... which requires') thay thế cho việc làm vườn (gardening).

q: The word 'patient' in paragraph 1 is OPPOSITE in meaning to ______.
e: Từ 'patient' (kiên nhẫn) trái nghĩa với 'impatient' (thiếu kiên nhẫn, nóng vội).

q: According to the passage, which of the following is NOT TRUE?
o: The writer dislikes eating tomatoes and cucumbers.
The writer grows organic vegetables behind the house.
The hobby started when the writer received a pot of daisies.
e: Bài đọc ghi 'I love eating the fresh tomatoes and cucumbers', nên nói 'dislikes' (ghét) là SAI.

q: According to the passage, why does the writer prefer home-grown vegetables?
o: Because they are safer and tastier than those in the market.
Because they grow faster than weeds.
Because they are more expensive to sell.
e: Chi tiết trong bài: 'because they are much safer and tastier than those bought in the market'.

q: What is the passage mainly about?
o: A volunteer campaign to clean up a local beach
A school trip to an island
How to catch fish using nets
e: Đoạn văn mô tả chiến dịch tình nguyện dọn rác bãi biển của trường học.

q: The word 'gathered' in paragraph 1 is CLOSEST in meaning to ______.
e: Từ 'gather' (tập trung, tụ tập) đồng nghĩa với 'assemble'.

q: The word 'It' in paragraph 1 refers to ______.
o: Seeing how much trash was left on the sand
e: Đại từ 'It' (trong 'It was shocking to see...') là chủ ngữ giả thay thế cho việc nhìn thấy lượng rác khổng lồ trên cát.

q: The word 'cleaner' in paragraph 1 is OPPOSITE in meaning to ______.
e: Từ 'cleaner' (sạch hơn) trái nghĩa với 'dirtier' (bẩn hơn).

q: According to the passage, which of the following is NOT TRUE?
o: Only five students participated in the campaign.
They collected plastic bottles and food wrappers.
The volunteers worked hard for three hours.
The groups were given trash bags and gloves.
e: Bài đọc ghi 'More than two hundred students and teachers participated', nên nói chỉ có 5 học sinh là SAI.

q: According to the passage, why did the school organize this campaign?
o: To raise awareness of environmental protection.
To sell plastic bottles for money.
e: Chi tiết trong bài: 'because we wanted to raise people's awareness of environmental protection'.

q: What is the passage mainly about?
o: The benefits and drawbacks of using smartphones
Why teenagers shouldn't talk to their families
How to repair a broken smartphone
e: Đoạn văn nói về vai trò của điện thoại thông minh (lợi ích) và những tác hại nếu dùng quá nhiều.

q: The word 'convenient' in paragraph 1 is CLOSEST in meaning to ______.
e: Từ 'convenient' (tiện lợi) đồng nghĩa với 'handy'.

q: The word 'which' in paragraph 1 refers to ______.
e: Đại từ 'which' thay thế cho cả mệnh đề phía trước 'spending hours staring at their screens' (việc dành hàng giờ nhìn vào màn hình).

q: The word 'connect' in paragraph 1 is OPPOSITE in meaning to ______.
e: Từ 'connect' (kết nối) trái nghĩa với 'disconnect' (ngắt kết nối).

q: According to the passage, which of the following is NOT TRUE?
o: Smartphones have no negative effects on our health.
Staring at screens too much can harm eyesight.
Smartphones can be used to access the Internet.
It is important to limit our screen time.
e: Đoạn văn nêu rõ điện thoại thông minh có thể gây hại mắt, thiếu ngủ, nên nói nó không có tác động tiêu cực (no negative effects) là SAI.

q: According to the passage, why should we limit our screen time?
o: To maintain a healthy lifestyle and face-to-face interactions.
To avoid paying high internet bills.
To save battery power for the next day.
e: Chi tiết trong bài: 'limit our screen time to maintain a healthy lifestyle' và tránh giảm 'face-to-face interactions'.

q: What is the passage mainly about?
o: The numerous benefits of learning a foreign language
Why international companies pay high salaries
The history of the English language
e: Đoạn văn nói về các lợi ích tuyệt vời của việc học ngoại ngữ, đặc biệt là tiếng Anh.

q: The word 'opportunities' in paragraph 1 is CLOSEST in meaning to ______.
e: Từ 'opportunities' (cơ hội) đồng nghĩa với 'chances'.

q: The word 'It' in paragraph 1 refers to ______.
e: Đại từ 'It' (trong câu 'It improves our memory') thay thế cho 'learning a new language' ở câu trước.

q: The word 'confident' in paragraph 1 is OPPOSITE in meaning to ______.
e: Từ 'confident' (tự tin) trái nghĩa với 'insecure' (thiếu tự tin, bất an).

q: According to the passage, which of the following is NOT TRUE?
o: Learning a foreign language is always quick and easy.
You can learn about customs and culture through language.
English is required by many top universities.
e: Bài đọc ghi 'mastering a foreign language can be difficult and takes a lot of time', nên nói việc học luôn nhanh và dễ là SAI.

q: According to the passage, why is learning a foreign language good for the brain?
o: Because it improves memory and problem-solving skills.
Because you don't have to think actively.
Because it requires a lot of money.
Because it makes you sleep better at night.
e: Chi tiết trong bài: 'It improves our memory and enhances our problem-solving skills'.

q: What is the passage mainly about?
o: An exciting school trip to the city zoo
A sunny day in the city center
How to feed monkeys and crocodiles
e: Đoạn văn kể lại chuyến đi thú vị của học sinh đến sở thú thành phố.

q: The word 'huge' in paragraph 1 is CLOSEST in meaning to ______.
e: Từ 'huge' (rộng lớn, khổng lồ) đồng nghĩa với 'enormous'.

q: The word 'their' in paragraph 1 refers to ______.
e: Đại từ 'their' (trong 'their first time seeing...') chỉ sự sở hữu của những học sinh ('the students').

q: The word 'wild' in paragraph 1 is OPPOSITE in meaning to ______.
e: Từ 'wild' (hoang dã) trái nghĩa với 'tame' (đã thuần chủng, hiền lành).

q: According to the passage, which of the following is NOT TRUE?
o: The lions were sleeping quietly when they entered.
They saw tall giraffes eating leaves.
The weather was sunny and pleasant.
The students learned about animal conservation.
e: Bài đọc ghi 'immediately attracted by the loud roars of the lions' (tiếng gầm lớn), nên nói sư tử đang ngủ yên tĩnh (sleeping quietly) là SAI.

q: According to the passage, why were the students very excited?
o: Because it was their first time seeing wild animals in real life.
Because they could ride the giraffes.
Because it started to rain heavily.
e: Chi tiết trong bài: 'The students were very excited because it was their first time seeing these wild animals in real life'.

q: What is the passage mainly about?
o: An enjoyable trip to the countryside
A beautiful forest in the countryside
e: Câu hỏi ý chính: Đoạn văn kể về một chuyến đi thú vị đến vùng nông thôn của tác giả ('spending an enjoyable day in the countryside').

q: The word “roaming” in paragraph 1 is CLOSEST in meaning to ______ .
e: Từ 'roaming' (đi lang thang, thong dong) gần nghĩa nhất với cụm từ 'walking around' (đi dạo quanh).

q: The word “it” in paragraph 1 refers to _______.
e: Đại từ 'it' trong câu 'we rented a boat and rode it' thay thế cho danh từ 'a boat' (chiếc thuyền) vừa được nhắc đến ngay trước đó.

q: The word “failed” in paragraph 1 is OPPOSITE in meaning to _______.
e: Từ 'failed' (thất bại) trái nghĩa với từ 'succeeded' (thành công).

q: According to the passage, which of the following is NOT TRUE?
o: The writer went on a trip to the countryside alone.
The writer could not count birds and animals in the forest.
The writer went fishing on a boat and caught some big fish.
The writer enjoyed a wonderful day in the countryside.
e: Bài đọc có chi tiết 'My brother and sister also went with me that day' (Anh và em gái tôi cũng đi cùng), do đó thông tin tác giả đi một mình (alone) là SAI.

q: According to the passage, why did the storyteller really enjoy the day out?
o: Because it brought him close to a peaceful, natural environment away from the busy city.
Because the countryside was very far from where he lived.
Because he caught some small fish while fishing.
Because he could count all the different kinds of birds and animals.
e: Chi tiết được nêu rõ ở câu cuối cùng của đoạn văn: 'because it brought me close to a very peaceful and natural environment, away from the busy and noisy city life'.
